text:
Healthy Villagers (元気な村人) (げんきなむらびと, Genki no Murabito) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

|-
!How to Obtain:
|align=center colspan="3"|These villagers can be found in their village hidden within the mountain. However, the correct conditions must be met prior to gaining this card. An in-game event is triggered whereby the player must offer all their money and their clothes (as well as any other request the wish) to the villagers to gain their trust. Upon returning to these villagers with their trust, you are able to use any means of card restoration to gain this card. For example Paladin's Necklace.
|
|}

Summary

Healthy Villagers 元気な村人 - are very healthy villagers! They are over-flowing with energy and live happily in their village in the mountains. To gain this card, the player must first find the sick villagers quest, during which they will ask the player which involve dis-positioning the player in some bad way. An example would be asking for all your money, or all your clothes, or all of your cards, etc. After which, you are granted the opportunity to heal and revive the villagers. Upon successful revival, the sick villagers card transforms into this one. (It may be worth noting however, that completing the Sick Villagers quest is best advised early on in the game since giving away all of your possessions later on in the game will cause a major setback).

Healthy_Villagers_(G.I_card) =scan=.png|2011 Anime ver. Scan
 

Trivia

These villagers present the player with a Wild Luck Alexandrite, provided they first remove the curse that has befallen their entire village (and have helped them out by giving them money and clothes).
